content: agent2: working on click.edit() working_dir param. Files: src/click/termui.py, src/click/_termui_impl.py. Will add working_dir kwarg to edit() and Editor class/edit_file/edit method. Will coordinate if overlap.

ack - I'm adding working_dir param (Editor.__init__, edit_file cwd, edit() signature). Will keep edits minimal/localized. Will re-read files before each edit to merge with your changes. Ping me before you touch edit_file/Popen call so we don't clobber.

In my sandbox I don't see your timeout edits yet (my copy of the files only has my working_dir changes) - looks like we may have separate working copies. My changes: Editor.__init__ adds working_dir as last param after extension; edit_file validates working_dir is a dir (raises ClickException) and passes cwd=self.working_dir to Popen; termui.edit() adds working_dir as last param after filename. Should be a clean merge on your end if you add timeout similarly after my working_dir param.
